reviews.review_text: Jorge was excellent and the food was delicious as always
jorge was the best .We love him.And the food was great.
Jorge was amazing and a hard worker he was doing most of the work and still making good timing
We love Jorge!!! Always a welcoming host/bartender/server.  He always makes our experience a great one.
Jonathan and Jorge are the absolute best servers around!!!! Love the food and service there!!!!
love the robot server!  tacos said they came with rice and beans.... but only if you get 3 tacos (doesn't say that on menu)
jorge was the best .We love him.And the food was great.
Jonathan and Jorge are the absolute best servers around!!!! Love the food and service there!!!!
Cristian and Bird are the best in the business. Elena is even better! My wife and I have been coming in for a few years and it's always a great experience!
Jorge was amazing and a hard worker he was doing most of the work and still making good timing

Great meal, great service, great environment.  Jorge did an amazing job with our big family. He added to our birthday  celebration with the right humor and definitely made it more fun and entertaining. We appreciate Jorge, his service and attitude! Great team all around!
Jorge did an amazing job caring for a very large and rowdy birthday group. Food was excellent. Service was even better!!!!
We love Jorge!!! Always a welcoming host/bartender/server.  He always makes our experience a great one.

Taco Tuesday. Ordered take out.  Enchilada sweetes. Two Carne Asada tacos with onions, cilantro and chihuahua cheese. But while I waited I tried the  Margaritas Chamoyadas ** Mango **.  WOW. IT WAS AMAZING.  Definitely worth more visits back.  Service was great Vania was very friendly and professional.  Great experience tonight.
Ask for Jorge! He makes the guest experience the most fun I have had at a restaurant to date. The food, hospitality, and general enjoyment is always what I look forward to when coming to Los Tres!

Great meal, great service, great environment.  Jorge did an amazing job with our big family. He added to our birthday  celebration with the right humor and definitely made it more fun and entertaining. We appreciate Jorge, his service and attitude! Great team all around!

Have been coming here every week for the last year. Jorge has always taken care of us and made our experience amazing. He is the lifeblood of this restaurant and the reason I come back. The food is great and the drinks keep me going.
Jorge was an amazing server. He made our experience fun

Robotic "server" is ridiculous, getting out of my booth to serve myself is insulting. Its speaker is inaudible as it passes by for every tables order. Food was rough and the only server was clearly over worked

Food was great, had the Burrito Chipotle, partner has the brillaquesa tacos, both were delicious!! Couldn't stop eating. The Lime Cucumber margarita could have been a little spicier imo but it was still good. Mesa was our server and did a wonderful job. Will absolutely be coming again
Food was amazing and the staff was great. Joyce was on top of everything and there was not any issues at all for our group of 21!

Food was great, server was friendly ! Had a great after movie dinner. Don't miss out on the
Watermelon Margarita 🍉 Bonus points for carding my wife 😜
Had a very fun time - our server Milena was great - -!: the portions were huge. The robot assistant is very entertaining for the kids, too.

Had lunch with my Daughters on Mother's Day here.  I had my favorite dish, chicken enchiladas suiza, delicious as always.
The girls had chicken fajitas and the sampler platter.
It was a good time filled with laughter and good food.

We ordered a shrimp taco meal, a la cart chicken burrito plus queso and kids burrito meal. They were all delicious. Server took care of everything we needed. The robot bringing the food was a hit with my 5-year-old!

I was tempted to try the Chamoyadas and I was pleasantly surprised when I did. Definitely, a unique flavor with Tajin and lime on the rim which was super tasty! Luisa recommended the drink to us and it was a great recommendation.
